arts.ttl: Spurs fans react on social media after a bizarre Squid Game tie-in was staged at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium prior to their clash with Liverpool
arts.sum: As Spurs prepared to play host to the league leaders, supporters at the stadium were treated to various activities inspired by the hit Netflix show Squid Game.

arts.ttl: Why Federico Chiesa is not in Liverpool squad for Tottenham
arts.sum: Federico Chiesa has been left out by Arne Slot for the Premier League meeting between Liverpool and Tottenham

arts.ttl: Spurs confirmed team vs Liverpool - Djed Spence starts as Postecoglou sticks
arts.sum: Now the overused Spurs players must take to the turf again at the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium against a Liverpool team that has had an extra day to recover and was the subject of numerous changes for their Carabao Cup quarter-final at Southampton. Postecoglou's threadbare squad have battled through this week with back-to-back victories in games against Southampton and Manchester United in the Premier League and Carabao Cup respectively and managing to score nine goals across those two encounters despite having 10 unavailable first team players in each.

arts.ttl: Tottenham-Liverpool lineups confirmed as Darwin Nunez, Djed Spence decisions announced
arts.sum: Djed Spence starts for Tottenham Hotspur in their Premier League clash with Liverpool, while Luis Diaz and Cody Gakpo get the nod up front for the visitors.

arts.ttl: Tottenham v Liverpool: Premier League – live
arts.sum: Premier League updates from the 4.30pm GMT kick-off Get in touch! You can email Rob with your thoughts here Jonathan Wilson on Big Ange Given his comments this week about football management being a harder job than prime minister, it’s fair to say Ange Postecoglou is feeling the pressure. Not for him calculations that will materially affect the lives of millions for years to come; no, he has to work out a way to try to get a result at home to Liverpool on Sunday. And yet, counterintuitively, it is Postecoglou who is the one more likely to stick to his principles. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Darwin Nunez out as seven Liverpool changes made by Arne Slot for Tottenham
arts.sum: Liverpool's team news confirmed as the Reds are hosted by Tottenham Hotspur in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Tottenham eyeing midfield prodigy in January after watching him this week
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur have been linked with the move for the Ajax attacking midfielder Rayane Bounida. According to a report from Dutch publication Het Parool, Tottenham director Johan Lange watched the player in action earlier this week and it will be interesting to see if they step up their efforts to sign the player. The report […] The post Tottenham eyeing midfield prodigy in January after watching him this week appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Are you not entertained?' - Spurs survive chaos to keep cup dream alive
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou's hopes of a second-season trophy are still alive after Tottenham's chaotic win over Manchester United, writes Phil McNulty.

Martin Zubimendi has said the uncertainty surrounding his future was an ‘uncomfortable’ time during the summer, amid interest from Liverpool. Zubimendi was a transfer target for Liverpool, who informed Real Sociedad of their intention to match the midfielder’s €60m release clause. Arne Slot made the Spain international his first-choice option in the summer window, but […] The post Zubimendi discusses ‘uncomfortable’ Liverpool speculation first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Tottenham eyeing bargain move for playmaker with 32 goals & 41 assists
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly keen on signing the Borussia Dortmund attacking midfielder Julian Brandt. The 28-year-old has been an important player for the German club and his performances have attracted the attention of the North London club. He has 32 goals and 41 assists in the league since joining Dortmund. Brandt has been linked with […] The post Tottenham eyeing bargain move for playmaker with 32 goals & 41 assists appeared first on CaughtOffside.
